title: Password Reset
headings: Reset Password
content: Reset Password Reset Password document.getElementById('resetBtn').addEventListener('click',function(){ const p1=document.getElementById('newPass').value; const p2=document.getElementById('newPass2').value; if(p1 && p1===p2){ const user=localStorage.getItem('pdUser')?JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('pdUser')):null; if(user){ user.password=p1; localStorage.setItem('pdUser',JSON.stringify(user)); } a

title: Privacy Policy
headings: Privacy Policy
content: Privacy Policy Pic Detective uses OpenAI's image analysis API to process uploaded files. Images are sent securely to OpenAI for analysis and are not stored by Pic Detective beyond the time needed to complete the request. According to OpenAI's policy, images submitted through the API may be retained for a short period to monitor abuse but are not used to build advertising profiles or shared with th
